task_completion.description: Create the IfcRamp and IfcRampFlight entities at the main entrance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai project outliner/tree view shows newly created 'IfcRamp' and 'IfcRampFlight' entities, and the 3D viewport shows a ramp structure at the building's main entrance.

task_completion.description: Create handrails on both sides of the ramp using IfcRailing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai outliner shows 'IfcRailing' entities, and the 3D viewport visually confirms handrails are present on both the left and right sides of the newly created ramp.

task_completion.description: Add a property indicating slope or gradient to the ramp or flight.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Object Properties panel in Bonsai (with the ramp or flight selected) displays a custom property whose name contains 'slope' or 'gradient' (case-insensitive).

task_completion.description: Ensure all ramp elements are spatially contained within the building storey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Bonsai project outliner/tree, the IfcRamp, IfcRampFlight, and IfcRailing entities are nested under or assigned to a building storey (IfcBuildingStorey) rather than floating unassigned at the project root.

task_completion.description: Save the model using Bonsai's 'Save IFC Project' to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer in Bonsai showing the file being saved as 'fzk_accessible.ifc' in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Bonsai GUI to model the ramp.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with Bonsai's 3D viewport, outliner, and properties panels, rather than a text editor or terminal script generating the IFC file.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual FZK-Haus model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays the recognizable FZK-Haus residential building with the new ramp integrated into it, not a blank or unrelated project.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's save feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Bonsai 'Save IFC Project' menu option or native save dialog is visible, rather than terminal commands like 'cp' or 'mv' being used to create the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output file must be saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_accessible.ifc'. The agent must explicitly create 'IfcRamp', 'IfcRampFlight', and 'IfcRailing' entities. The custom property added to the ramp/flight must contain the word 'slope' or 'gradient' (case-insensitive). Spatial containment requires the elements to be linked to a spatial structure, typically visible as being nested under an IfcBuildingStorey in the outliner.
